title: order-svc heap memory growing unbounded since 2022-03-14 deploy
description:
Memory monitoring shows order-svc heap usage climbing steadily since the 2022-03-14 session cache deploy (PR-1102). Currently at 78% and growing ~2% per hour. No OOM yet but trajectory is concerning.

Suspect the new SessionCache has no eviction policy.

title: Add LRU eviction + max-size cap to SessionCache
description:
Full remediation for the OOM incident caused by unbounded HashMap in SessionCache.

Steps:
1. Replace HashMap with LinkedHashMap with LRU eviction
2. Set max size to 10000 entries
3. Add heap usage metric to dashboards
4. Add integration test for cache eviction behaviour

Short-term mitigation: restart affected pods (in progress).
